examples: Many foreigners, including Australians, are visiting Expo 2019, Beijing.
The 10th China Flower Expo is being held in Chongming.
Dubai is going to hold the World Expo this year.
The Electronic Entertainment Expo, or E3, is the trade show for the video and computer games industry.
Both are expected to feature at the E3 expo, which runs from 15-17 June.
